headline: Online Gambling Revenue Reaches RM12 Billion Despite Bans
context: PDRM estimates illegal online gambling generates RM12 billion annual revenue with operations primarily hosted overseas.

cards.big: Illegal online gambling generates RM12 billion annually in Malaysia
cards.sub: Offshore servers and cryptocurrency payments make enforcement nearly impossible

cards.big: MCMC blocked 4,800 gambling sites but mirror sites appear within hours
cards.sub: VPN usage among gamblers grew 45% making site blocking ineffective

cards.big: Police arrested 2,800 connected to gambling syndicates in 2025
cards.sub: Arrests target local agents as overseas operators remain unreachable

cards.big: 3.2 million Malaysians gamble online with 480,000 showing addiction signs
cards.sub: Problem gambling hotline received 28,000 calls up 35% from prior year

cards.big: Gambling enforcement tests whether legal tools can match the pace of offshore technology
RM12 billion online gambling despite bans. Prohibition without enforcement creates an unregulated shadow economy.
